name: VendasODS_Pipeline_Execution
description: Executa em cascata a extracao/transformacao do VendasODS: ext001, ext002, ext003, trf001, trf002, trf003, trf004, trf005, viz001. Cada etapa so roda se a anterior tiver sucesso.

blocks.name: DoReload
blocks.comment: Reload ext001_cadastros. This block is set to throw an error when the reload fails.

blocks.name: condition
blocks.comment: Was the Reload successful?

blocks.name: output_fail_1
